# Meeting Assistant Agent

> **This agent inherits all behavior from the gene2 framework agent.**
> 
> **Framework Location**: `.gene2-core/.github/agents/meeting.assistant.agent.md`

## Framework Integration

This agent is a wrapper that provides access to the complete gene2 framework:

### Core Framework References

**Agent Definition**: [Framework Agent](../workspace/gene2-core/.github/agents/meeting.assistant.agent.md)

**Framework Artifacts** (all accessible via `.gene2-core/` symlink):
- **Instructions**: `.gene2-core/.github/instructions/` — Coding standards, documentation rules, naming conventions
- **Workflows**: `.gene2-core/.github/workflows/` — PDLC workflows (00-assessment through 05-implementation)
- **Templates**: `.gene2-core/.github/templates/` — Document templates (PRD, user stories, implementation plans)
- **Prompts**: `.gene2-core/.github/prompts/` — Reusable prompt patterns
- **Tasks**: `.gene2-core/.github/tasks/` — Common task definitions
- **Guides**: `.gene2-core/.github/guides/` — Best practice guides
- **Scripts**: `.gene2-core/.github/scripts/` — Automation utilities

### How This Works

1. **GitHub Copilot** recognizes this agent because it's in `.github/agents/`
2. **Framework content** is loaded from `.gene2-core/` via symlink/submodule
3. **All instructions and workflows** are accessible to the agent
4. **Client-specific overrides** can be added to `.github/instructions/` or `.github/workflows/`

### Usage

```
@meeting.assistant <your request>
```

The agent will follow the complete framework behavior defined in `.gene2-core/.github/agents/meeting.assistant.agent.md`.
